1752230.name: Echoed Memories Demo
1752230.description:
*Completed Demo save files will unlock bonuses in the main game.

The demo is a short prequel story, acting as a prelude between EM1's ending and EM2's beginning. It showcases several characters, the battle system and cutscenes, various gameplay systems and may or may not features cute girls (and guys!) in swimsuits.

May or may not be a beach episode.
1752230.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
